info.title: Shamwari AI
info.description:
Africa's open source AI platform — API backend.

Shamwari AI provides AI inference, model management, and developer APIs purpose-built for African languages and contexts. Built by Nyuchi Africa.

post.description: Generate an AI response given a conversation history. Follows the OpenAI-compatible chat completions format for maximum interoperability with existing client libraries. Supports Shamwari AI models with African language capabilities.

get.description: Returns all AI models with status 'ready'. Each model includes Schema.org SoftwareApplication metadata: supported languages, capabilities, version, and pricing.
Returns detailed information about a specific AI model by slug. Includes Schema.org SoftwareApplication structured data.
Returns paginated list of conversations for the authenticated user. Each conversation includes Schema.org Conversation metadata.

post.description: Start a new chat conversation with the specified AI model.

get.description: Returns a conversation with its full message history. Messages include Schema.org Message structured data.
Returns paginated messages for a specific conversation.
Returns the authenticated user's profile with Schema.org Person structured data. Includes preferences, role, and organization memberships.

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's display name, avatar, or preferences.

get.description: Returns organization details with Schema.org Organization structured data. Requires membership in the organization.

403.description: Not a member of this organization

patch.description: Update organization name or description. Requires admin or owner role.

post.description: Create a new organization. The authenticated user becomes the owner.

get.description: Returns all members of an organization with their roles.

403.description: Not a member of this organization

get.description: Returns all API keys for the authenticated user's organization. Key hashes are never exposed — only the prefix for identification.

schema.title: Response List Api Keys V1 Api Keys Get

post.description: Create a new API key. The full key is returned exactly once in the response — it cannot be retrieved again. Store it securely.

403.description: Maximum API keys reached for current plan

delete.description: Permanently revoke an API key. This action cannot be undone.

get.description: Returns all active billing plans with Schema.org Offer structured data. Includes pricing, token quotas, rate limits, and feature flags.

schema.title: Response List Plans V1 Billing Plans Get

get.description: Returns the current organization's subscription with Schema.org Order structured data. Includes billing period, status, and payment method.
Returns paginated invoice history with Schema.org Invoice structured data. Includes line items, payment status, and billing periods.
Returns paginated API usage events with Schema.org UseAction structured data. Filter by date range, model, or API key.
Returns aggregated usage metrics for the current billing period. Includes total requests, tokens, latency averages, and error rates.
Returns paginated list of training datasets with Schema.org Dataset structured data. Filter by language, status, or domain.

post.description: Register a new training dataset. Upload the data file separately to R2.

get.description: Returns detailed dataset information with Schema.org Dataset structured data.

post.description: Submit a rating (thumbs up/down) on an AI response. Used for model quality tracking and RLHF training data.

get.description: Returns paginated feedback with Schema.org Review structured data. Filter by model, rating, or language.

status.title: Status
status.description: Model status: training, ready, deprecated, archived

AIModelResponse.title: AIModelResponse
AIModelResponse.description:
AI model response.

Schema.org @type: SoftwareApplication
Maps: version → softwareVersion, capabilities → applicationCategory,
      supported_languages → inLanguage

scopes.title: Scopes
scopes.description: Permission scopes: inference, fine_tune, datasets, models_read, usage_read

key.title: Key
key.description: The full API key (shown once, never again)

APIKeyCreateResponse.title: APIKeyCreateResponse
APIKeyCreateResponse.description: Response after creating an API key — includes the plaintext key (shown once).

APIKeyResponse.title: APIKeyResponse
APIKeyResponse.description: API key response (excludes key_hash for security).

BillingPlanResponse.title: BillingPlanResponse
BillingPlanResponse.description:
Billing plan response.

Schema.org @type: Offer
Maps: price_monthly_usd → price, name → name

ChatCompletionRequest.title: ChatCompletionRequest
ChatCompletionRequest.description:
Chat completion request (OpenAI-compatible format).

Follows the de facto industry standard for maximum interoperability
with existing client libraries and tools.

ChatCompletionResponse.title: ChatCompletionResponse
ChatCompletionResponse.description:
Chat completion response (OpenAI-compatible format).

Intentionally does NOT use Schema.org — follows industry standard
for client library compatibility.

ChatMessageInput.title: ChatMessageInput
ChatMessageInput.description: A single message in a chat completion request (OpenAI-compatible).

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: Included when fetching a single conversation

ConversationResponse.title: ConversationResponse
ConversationResponse.description:
Conversation response.

Schema.org @type: Conversation
Maps: title → name, language → inLanguage

DatasetResponse.title: DatasetResponse
DatasetResponse.description:
Dataset response.

Schema.org @type: Dataset
Maps: language → inLanguage, format → encodingFormat

FeedbackResponse.title: FeedbackResponse
FeedbackResponse.description:
Feedback response.

Schema.org @type: Review
Maps: rating → reviewRating, comment → reviewBody

InvoiceResponse.title: InvoiceResponse
InvoiceResponse.description:
Invoice response.

Schema.org @type: Invoice
Maps: amount_usd → totalPaymentDue, status → paymentStatus

MessageResponse.title: MessageResponse
MessageResponse.description:
Message response.

Schema.org @type: Message
Maps: content → text, role → sender

role.title: Role
role.description: Member role: owner, admin, member, billing

OrganizationResponse.title: OrganizationResponse
OrganizationResponse.description:
Organization response.

Schema.org @type: Organization
Maps: name → name, slug → url, description → description

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of items matching the query

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of items matching the query

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of items matching the query

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of items matching the query

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of items matching the query

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of items matching the query

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of items matching the query

SubscriptionResponse.title: SubscriptionResponse
SubscriptionResponse.description:
Subscription response.

Schema.org @type: Order
Maps: plan → orderedItem, status → orderStatus

UsageResponse.title: UsageResponse
UsageResponse.description:
Usage event response.

Schema.org @type: UseAction
Maps: tokens → result, timestamp → startTime

UsageSummaryResponse.title: UsageSummaryResponse
UsageSummaryResponse.description: Aggregated usage summary for a time period.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: UI theme: light, dark, or system

UserResponse.title: UserResponse
UserResponse.description:
User profile response.

Schema.org @type: Person
Maps: display_name → name, avatar_url → image, email → email
